translation.literal_translation: And because of declaration of difference, (He is) another. (21)
translation.technical_translation: Sutra 1.1.21: the inner person is other than jiva, established by explicit bheda-vyapadesha.
translation.interpretive_note: Sutra compression of antaryamin distinction proof.

lexical_notes.gloss: and because of difference statement, another
lexical_notes.contextual_sense: Sutra infers inner controller is distinct from empirical jiva position.
Aphorism secures ontological distinction required by antaryamin structure.

lexical_notes.gloss: difference discourse between jiva and Ishvara
lexical_notes.contextual_sense: Transactional distinction is maintained for scriptural consistency in governance passages.
Distinct controller role cannot collapse into controlled entity.

uncertainty_notes: Curated in contiguous S01 pass with stable inferential-tag schema.
A later philological pass should revisit antaraditya imagery and akasha lexical-paradigmatic nuances in records 1.1.072-1.1.079.
